description_long: This apartment building features a distinctive adobe-style architecture with flat roofs, thick walls, and a warm, earthy color palette. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rectangular and octagonal sections, some with crenellated parapets and others with simple flat surfaces. Small, regularly spaced windows and a few prominent doorways are visible, with some doors accented in green and purple. A set of exterior stairs connects different levels, and the building's massing suggests at least two stories in several sections. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional Southwestern or North African urban dwellings, with a focus on communal living and rooftop accessibility. The building's exterior is predominantly smooth, with subtle textural variations and minimal decorative elements.
description: A multi-story adobe-style apartment building with flat roofs, crenellated parapets, and small, regularly spaced windows. The structure features earthy tones, exterior stairs, and a blend of rectangular and octagonal forms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, crenellated tower, and a prominent staircase leading to the upper level.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's L-shaped layout, flat roofs, and the octagonal tower section.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the interconnected sections, rooftop access, and the stepped design of the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the secondary entrance, additional windows, and the rear staircase.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are small, rectangular, and evenly spaced in single rows along the exterior walls, with a generally symmetrical and utilitarian arrangement.
